title: RocketPD — Flexible Page

fields.label: Page Sections
fields.name: rpd_flex_sections
fields.instructions: Add, remove, and drag to reorder sections. Each section has its own background, padding, and content fields.

sub_fields.label: Text scheme
sub_fields.name: text_scheme
sub_fields.instructions: Override text colours for this section. Use when the background doesn't give enough contrast automatically — most useful with Image backgrounds.

sub_fields.label: Highlight phrase
sub_fields.name: highlight
sub_fields.instructions: A word or phrase from the headline to render in gold. Must match exactly.

sub_fields.label: Custom CSS
sub_fields.name: custom_css
sub_fields.instructions: CSS scoped to this section automatically. Write bare declarations: h2 { color: red; }. Use & to target the section itself: & { border-top: 2px solid gold; }.

sub_fields.label: Text scheme
sub_fields.name: text_scheme
sub_fields.instructions: Override text colours for this section. Use when the background doesn't give enough contrast automatically — most useful with Image backgrounds.

sub_fields.label: Custom CSS
sub_fields.name: custom_css
sub_fields.instructions: CSS scoped to this section automatically. Write bare declarations: h2 { color: red; }. Use & to target the section itself: & { border-top: 2px solid gold; }.

sub_fields.label: Text scheme
sub_fields.name: text_scheme
sub_fields.instructions: Override text colours for this section. Use when the background doesn't give enough contrast automatically — most useful with Image backgrounds.

sub_fields.label: Icon
sub_fields.name: icon
sub_fields.instructions: Lucide icon. Leave blank for no icon.

sub_fields.label: Custom CSS
sub_fields.name: custom_css
sub_fields.instructions: CSS scoped to this section automatically. Write bare declarations: h2 { color: red; }. Use & to target the section itself: & { border-top: 2px solid gold; }.

sub_fields.name: custom_css
sub_fields.instructions: CSS scoped to this section automatically. Write bare declarations: h2 { color: red; }. Use & to target the section itself: & { border-top: 2px solid gold; }.

sub_fields.label: Text scheme
sub_fields.name: text_scheme
sub_fields.instructions: Override text colours for this section. Use when the background doesn't give enough contrast automatically — most useful with Image backgrounds.

sub_fields.label: Custom CSS
sub_fields.name: custom_css
sub_fields.instructions: CSS scoped to this section automatically. Write bare declarations: h2 { color: red; }. Use & to target the section itself: & { border-top: 2px solid gold; }.

sub_fields.label: Text scheme
sub_fields.name: text_scheme
sub_fields.instructions: Override text colours for this section. Use when the background doesn't give enough contrast automatically — most useful with Image backgrounds.

sub_fields.label: Constrain width
sub_fields.name: constrain_width
sub_fields.instructions: On: HTML is contained within the standard page width. Off: HTML spans the full section width.

sub_fields.label: HTML
sub_fields.name: html_content
sub_fields.instructions: Use the Text tab to paste raw HTML. Headings and body text will automatically adapt to the section background via scoped CSS.

sub_fields.label: Custom CSS
sub_fields.name: custom_css
sub_fields.instructions: CSS scoped to this section automatically. Write bare declarations: h2 { color: red; }. Use & to target the section itself: & { border-top: 2px solid gold; }.

description: Flexible content builder for composing pages from reusable section layouts.
